reference: I have been experiencing sharp stabbing pains on the left side of my chest. They come quickly and last for about a minute. Just this afternoon, the stabbing pain has prolonged and radiated to my left shoulder blade. I have an achy pain in my shoulder and arm. I do not know if I need to go to the emergency room or wait to call my cardiologist. I am a twenty-seven-year-old female with a previous atrial septal defect repair at age five and a mitral valve replacement three years ago after having congestive heart failure. I do not know if this contributes to anything.
text: I have been experiencing sharp stabbing pains on the left side of my chest. They come quickly and last for about a minute. Just this afternoon, the stabbing pain has prolonged and radiated to my left shoulder blade. I have an aching pain in my shoulder and arm. I do not know if I need to go to the emergency room or wait to call my cardiologist. I have a 27 year old female with previous atrial septal defect repair at age five and a mitral valve replacement three years ago after having congestive heart failure. I do not know if this is worth anything.
